# Please do not file security vulnerabilities as public issues.

If you have found a security vulnerability in `plexara-agents`, please report it privately:

1. **GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting** (preferred): <https://github.com/plexara/plexara-agents/security/advisories/new>
2. **Email:** `support@plexara.io` with subject line beginning `[SECURITY]`

See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for the full disclosure process, supported versions, and what is in scope.

If you continue past this point and open a public issue, a maintainer may close it and ask you to refile through one of the channels above.
